===Format===
* '''Freedom Face-Off''' : ''August 16th - 17th
** 16 teams.
** 2 matchdays
* '''Day 1''' : ''August 16th
** 16 teams will play ''Payload mode.
** Match 1: Payload
** Match 2: Payload
** Match 3: Face Off One
*** WOW mode 3v3
*** 16th team vs anyone from top 3 team. 
** Match 4: Payload
** Match 5: Payload
** Match 6: Face Off One
*** WOW mode 3v3
*** 16th team vs anyone from top 3 team. 
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} qualify for ''Arena Battle'' on ''Day 2.
* '''Day 2''' : ''August 17th
** 8 teams
** Arena mode
** Single-elimination bracket
** All matches are Best-of-1. Final is Best-of-3.
